calendar.matters:
Petition Of Emma Puga To Determine Entitlement Of Omitted Spouse To Separate Property Of Jorge B. Puga A., Deceased Prob.C.6401, 21610, Et.Seq.
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Gomez, Jr. appeared by telephone for Emma Puga. James Morphy (Trustee) in Propria Persona.

Counsel addressed the issue of venue, date of marriage, whether Ms. Puga is an ommitted Spouse under the terms of the Trust and whether she is entitled to one third of the Trust. Mr. Morphy stated that he received a copy of the decedent's last will and testatment which was executed in 2001, that in it the decedent includes Emma Puga as an equal to receive a 25% share and names her as executor, and that he tried to file an objetion on behalf of one of the Beneficiaries but that it was rejected. Mr. Gomez stated that if the Mexican will was probated in Mexico, that an ancillary proceeding would be needed here and that he would petition to have his Client appointed. The Petition to Determine Entitlement of Omitted Spouse, etc. was taken under submission for the issue of venue.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Leonardini. (Not Reported)

Petition Of Emma Puga To Determine Entitlement Of Omitted Spouse To Separate Property Of Jorge B. Puga A., Deceased Prob.C.6401, 21610, Et.Seq.
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Emma Puga To Determine Entitlement Of Omitted Spouse To Separate Property Of Jorge B. Puga A., Deceased Prob.C.6401, 21610, Et.Seq.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Continued To Feb-10-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Posting Of Bond
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for and with James Morphy (Petitioner). Robert Gomez for Laura Del Campo (Petitioner/Objector).

The Petition for Appointment of Trustee filed on behalf of Mr. Morphy was granted (subject to review of the order). Bond will be set at $150,000.00. Mr. Morphy's powers will be limited with regard to the real property so that the property cannot be sold or transferred without Court approval. Ms. Del Campo's petition is denied. The Parties raised the issue of an omitted Spouse and the need to do discovery.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
